name: matchiq
description: Football match predictions powered by AI and statistical models

scripts.server: lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; PORT=3001 nodemon server.js --ignore prediction-history.json --ignore market-history.json --ignore wc-pre-predictions.json --ignore 'prediction-history-*.json' --ignore src/
scripts.dev: concurrently --no-kill-others-on-fail --names server,client "npm run server" "npm run client"
